narrativeProgression.summary: Evidence custody breaks for twenty-two minutes and no one logs it.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: A contradictory channel drop appears within minutes and forces risk.

threadUpdates.update: Escalation Signal: A contradictory channel drop appears within minutes and forces risk.
Peripheral signal tied to Festival lantern route map remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: The Harvest Men - Day 06 voicemail transcript
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Festival lantern route map.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: The Harvest Men ARG artifact Day 06. Type: voicemail_transcript. Clue focus: Festival lantern route map. Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: The Harvest Men voicemail_transcript audio cue for day 6. Clue anchor: Festival lantern route map. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Festival lantern route map and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_05.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Festival lantern route map.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

puzzle.title: Day 06 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Festival lantern route map.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with FEST.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
